article.title: How to Write SEO Content for Your Small Business Without Hiring a Writer
article.body_markdown:
Most small business owners know they need a blog. But who has 3 hours per article?

Here is the system:

1. Start with what your customers search - not what you want to say
2. Structure around the keyword - title, H1, H2, first 100 words
3. Demonstrate EEAT - real experience, specific examples
4. Write like a human - varied sentences, real opinions
5. Score yourself before publishing

AI makes this fast. I built [SEO Spark](https://seospark.net) to do it in 60 seconds.

Free tier: 3 articles, no credit card.
